Privacy Policy

Last updated: July 2025

1. Information We Collect

When you use our contact form, we collect your name, phone number, and any message you provide. This information is sent directly to our WhatsApp number and is not stored on this website.

We may also collect standard server log data (IP address, browser type, page visits) through our hosting provider for security and performance purposes.

2. How We Use Your Information

The information you provide through our contact form is used solely to respond to your enquiry and provide the electrical services you request. We do not sell, share, or rent your personal information to third parties.

3. WhatsApp Communication

Our contact form redirects to WhatsApp (wa.me) to facilitate communication. When you use this feature, your interaction is subject to WhatsApp's Privacy Policy in addition to ours. We encourage you to review WhatsApp's policies at whatsapp.com.

4. Cookies

This website does not use cookies for tracking or advertising purposes. Any cookies set are strictly necessary for the site to function correctly.

5. Third-Party Services

This site uses Google Maps for our location display. Google's use of data is governed by Google's Privacy Policy. We also use Google Fonts to serve typography — font files are loaded from Google's servers.

6. Your Rights

You have the right to request access to, correction of, or deletion of any personal information you have provided to us. To exercise these rights, contact us at the number below.

7. Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:

Bright Electrical and Engineering Works

Chungathara, Nilambur, Malappuram, Kerala 679334

Phone: 83049 10099

Bright Electrical

& Engineering Works

Kerala's trusted electrical engineering partner. Licensed, certified, and committed to quality across residential, commercial, and industrial projects.
